form.formComment: Raced two times to date. At long odds at debut, second last of 11 at this track on March 9 over 1200m, 12 len behind Kimio with 56kg at $44.90. Second-up 10th of 14 at this track on March 23 over 1200m, 13 len behind Ahmedabad with 56kg at $137.70. Great chance to bounce back to form.
